title: Crispy Kenyan-Style Fried Garlic Gyoza
description: A twist on traditional Japanese gyoza, these crispy fried dumplings are filled with a flavorful Kenyan-inspired garlic mixture.
instructions: In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the kenyan garlic paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the fermented cabbage and stir-fry until heated through.
Lay a pancake wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the garlic cabbage mixture in the center.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges to seal the gyoza.
Heat 1-2 inches of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the gyoza and fry until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the gyoza from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Sprinkle the crispy garlic flakes on top of the gyoza and serve hot.
